query: Check my .NET project's dependencies for vulnerabilities.
expected_behavior: Runs scripts/audit-to-findings.mjs to convert the audit to findings[] deterministically
Flags direct and transitive CVEs with DEP-* ruleIds and severity from the advisory

query: Convert this audit file to findings.
expected_behavior: Produces a critical transitive finding (System.Net.Http) and a high direct finding (Newtonsoft.Json)

query: We have a vulnerable transitive package with no direct reference.
expected_behavior: Marks it DEP-TRANSITIVE and recommends bumping/overriding the nearest direct package
If no fix exists, marks DEP-NOFIX (high) and documents a mitigation
Defers EOL/version status to lts-check and licensing to license-check
